title: XBot
description: Enterprise workflow orchestration on Apache Airflow. Complex DFOS schemas, IoT data streams, config-driven DAGs, full observability. Built from zero, owns itself in prod.

title: ManEx v3
description: Low-code automation engine. Non-engineers trigger full ETL workflows via JSON. 70+ composable functions: DB ops, API calls, validations, notifications. ~40% faster delivery.

title: This Portfolio
description: Hand-coded Flask portfolio with a data-driven JSON content layer, canvas animation, scroll-scrubbed intro, and a custom sniper cursor - no templates, no frameworks.

title: Kafka Streaming Pipeline
description: Real-time IoT telemetry ingestion via Apache Kafka. Event-driven Airflow triggers. Moving the entire platform from scheduled batch to continuous streaming architecture.
